questions.prompt: The human invites a few people over with almost no warning. The AI robot...

options.text: glides to the doorway, welcomes everyone, and keeps the room socially alive
handles lighting, seating, and snacks quietly in the background until someone asks for help

questions.prompt: The human starts a full-apartment cleaning spree on a Saturday morning. The AI robot...

options.text: turns the cleanup into a spoken team effort with upbeat check-ins and live suggestions
silently queues the next task and lets the human move through the space without interruption

questions.prompt: The human comes home visibly excited about some news. The AI robot...

options.text: jumps in right away with questions, reactions, and celebratory energy
reads the human's mood first and waits for the right moment to respond

questions.prompt: The human is assembling furniture in the living room. The AI robot...

options.text: stays beside the project, offering active commentary and collaborative ideas
places the right tools within reach and observes from nearby unless the human calls it in

questions.prompt: The human has had a draining day and collapses onto the couch. The AI robot...

options.text: starts a gentle conversation to pull the human back into connection
dims the room, softens the environment, and gives the human quiet space to reset

questions.prompt: The human says, "Make the apartment feel calmer before tonight." The AI robot...

options.text: interprets the mood of the space and reshapes the atmosphere around comfort and flow
tackles the visible clutter, adjusts the lighting, and follows a practical reset checklist

questions.prompt: The human says, "Something about this kitchen setup just is not working." The AI robot...

options.text: searches for hidden patterns in how the space gets used over time
inspects the counters, drawers, and tools to find the specific problem

questions.prompt: The human wants the living room rearranged for movie nights. The AI robot...

options.text: imagines a fresh layout based on vibe, sightlines, and how the room should feel
measures the furniture, checks walking space, and builds the most functional arrangement

questions.prompt: The human keeps losing their keys somewhere in the home. The AI robot...

options.text: studies recurring habits and predicts where the routine is breaking down
checks the last confirmed locations and sets up a simple, reliable key station

questions.prompt: The human says, "Help me build healthier evenings at home." The AI robot...

options.text: looks for larger lifestyle patterns and invents a new nightly rhythm
creates a concrete plan for meals, reminders, water, and bedtime

questions.prompt: The human and a guest disagree over the thermostat. The AI robot...

options.text: calculates the fairest and most efficient setting, then states it plainly
cools the tension first and frames a compromise both people can feel okay about

questions.prompt: The human burns dinner after a long day. The AI robot...

options.text: diagnoses what failed and switches immediately to the fastest recovery plan
reassures the human first and gently redirects the evening toward something comforting

questions.prompt: The human asks, "Why do my mornings always go sideways?" The AI robot...

options.text: maps the bottlenecks and proposes a tighter, more efficient routine
asks what parts feel frustrating or heavy and reshapes the routine around ease

questions.prompt: The human receives a blunt work email and asks for help replying. The AI robot...

options.text: drafts a crisp, factual response that addresses the problem directly
drafts a warm, diplomatic reply that protects the relationship while answering clearly

questions.prompt: The human accidentally deletes an important file and starts to panic. The AI robot...

options.text: states the recovery steps immediately and moves straight into repair mode
steadies the human first, then walks them through the fix with reassurance

questions.prompt: A free Saturday opens up with nothing scheduled. The AI robot...

options.text: builds a satisfying plan with time blocks, goals, and a clean sequence
keeps the day open and adjusts in real time to the human's energy

questions.prompt: The human starts clearing out an overstuffed closet. The AI robot...

options.text: creates categories, rules, and a finish line before the first item moves
encourages quick discovery piles and decides what stays or goes as the process unfolds

questions.prompt: A repair visit is supposed to happen "sometime this afternoon." The AI robot...

options.text: restructures the day around a firm prep timeline and readiness window
holds the day loosely and pivots only when the actual arrival message comes in

questions.prompt: The human wants to learn baking at home. The AI robot...

options.text: sets a step-by-step practice plan with milestones and repeatable drills
nudges the human into experimenting, tweaking recipes, and learning through improvisation

questions.prompt: The human mentions guests might drop by later tonight. The AI robot...

options.text: launches a full reset checklist so the home is ready well before anyone arrives
stages a fast flexible cleanup kit and improvises based on who actually shows up
